description_long: This object consists of two adjacent, rectangular vending machines with a weathered and aged appearance. The left machine features a red background with a classic Coca-Cola glass bottle and the iconic white Coca-Cola script, while the right machine displays a white background with a Diet Coke can and the Diet Coke logo. Both machines have visible black scuff marks and paint wear, suggesting long-term outdoor use. The front panels include a product retrieval slot near the bottom, a vertical column of product selection buttons, and a payment interface area. The sides and tops are mostly dark and worn, with branding graphics wrapping partially around the sides. The machines are boxy, metallic, and robust, typical of beverage vending machines found in urban environments.
description: A pair of weathered, boxy beverage vending machines featuring Coca-Cola and Diet Coke branding, with visible product slots, selection buttons, and payment interfaces on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bold Coca-Cola and Diet Coke branding graphics, with significant weathering and paint wear.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the product retrieval slots, vertical button panels, payment interfaces, and prominent Coca-Cola and Diet Coke logos.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite side view with large, partially visible branding graphics and heavy surface wear.
description_view_3: Back view showing the plain, dark, and heavily worn surfaces of both machines, with no visible interactive features.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located on the front of each machine above the product selection buttons, featuring printed instructions and possibly a digital or illuminated area.
attribute_payment_interface: Each machine has a payment interface on the front, including a coin slot and bill acceptor, located above or beside the product selection buttons.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual rectangular buttons is present on the front of each machine, each button likely corresponding to a different product, with visible colored labels.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located near the bottom center of each machine's front, with a recessed opening.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large Coca-Cola and Diet Coke logos and imagery dominate the front and sides of each machine, with red and white backgrounds, stylized text, and images of a glass bottle and a can.
